HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

GreenFHom3DPer2D Class Reference
Modules » Green's Functions

2D‑periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function with Ewald acceleration. More...

 Static Protected Attributes inherited from GreenF
static bool NeedsAccurate = false
 Request high‑accuracy integration where available.
 
static int Etm = 1
 Number of periodic evaluation terms (for periodic GFs).
 

Detailed Description

2D‑periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function with Ewald acceleration.

Key responsibilities:

  • Manage lattice/reciprocal vectors and Bloch vector projection into the periodic plane (ToPlane).
  • Perform Ewald‑split evaluations of the scalar kernel G and its source‑gradient grad'G (both smoothed and unsmoothed variants).
  • Provide RWG‑weighted integrals for RHS/post processing (delta, kappa) and same‑triangle batched assembly helpers.

Definition at line 34 of file GreenFHom3DPer2D.h.

epsilonMediumRelative permittivity \(\varepsilon_r\).
wavevectorBloch vector \(\mathbf k_B\).
latticeVectorFirst lattice vector \(\mathbf a_1\).

Scalar Bloch-periodic Green's function \( G(\mathbf r,\mathbf r')\).

◆ IntegrateD()

dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::IntegrateD ( RWGFun * f,
RWGFun * fp )
virtual

D-operator matrix element \(\langle \mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}),\,\overline{\overline G},\,\mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}^{\prime})\rangle\).

Parameters
fTesting RWG function (on observation triangle).
fpBasis RWG function (on source triangle).
Returns
Complex scalar entry of \(\mathbf D\).
Note
Not used for periodic homogeneous case; exits.

◆ IntegrateDelta()

cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::IntegrateDelta ( rvec r,
RWGFun * fp )
virtual

\(\boldsymbol \delta\) term at an observation point.

Parameters
rObservation point \(\mathbf r\).
fpSource RWG function.
Returns
Complex 3-vector contribution \(\boldsymbol \delta(\mathbf r)\).

Uses Evaluate/Smoothed and Gradient/GradientSmoothed according to the near/far heuristic, and applies analytic singularity subtraction.

The lattice translation \(\mathbf t\) that was applied to target.

Implements GreenFHom3DPer.
